title: Pakistan’s Business Bonanza: 3 Days to Launch Your Success at ChaiCon
excerpt: Get ready to jumpstart your entrepreneurial journey! ChaiCon returns to Karachi on May 10th-12th, 2024, bringing together the essential ingredients for any aspiring founder.
body_html:
Get ready to jumpstart your entrepreneurial journey! ChaiCon returns to Karachi on May 10–12, 2024 at the Karachi Expo Centre, bringing together the essential ingredients for any aspiring founder: capital, customers, mentors and a thousand cups of doodh-patti.

What is ChaiCon?

ChaiCon is Pakistan's largest startup, franchise and SME convention. Born out of the unstoppable chai-shop culture of Karachi, the event has grown from a small business meet-up in 2019 into a three-day flagship gathering that now draws more than 25,000 visitors, 300+ exhibitors and investors from the GCC, the UK and Southeast Asia.

Why this edition matters

Pakistan's macro picture remains noisy, but for early-stage founders the underlying tailwinds have never been stronger:

  • Roughly 64% of the population is under 30 — a young, mobile-first consumer base.
  • Retail digitisation is finally moving from urban centres to tier-2 cities like Hyderabad, Sialkot and Bahawalpur.
  • The State Bank has eased outbound payment routes for SaaS companies, so building for global markets from Karachi has never been more practical.

Day-by-day highlights

Day 1 — Franchise & SME

If you've ever dreamed of opening a Cinnabon, OPTP or a local brand like Karachi Halwa Puri Co., this is the day to walk the floor with your shortlist and meet master franchisees face to face. Expect on-the-spot LoI signings.

Day 2 — Tech & Startup

Pitch competitions, investor speed-dates and panels on the Pakistani SaaS playbook. The headliners this year include teams from Bazaar, Trax, Tazah and Educative, with at least three regional VCs running office hours.

Day 3 — Made in Pakistan

A celebration of manufacturing, agritech and exportable consumer brands — from Sialkot surgical instruments to Karachi-made halal cosmetics. If you sell physical product, this is your day.

How to prepare

  1. Have a one-line pitch ready — investors at ChaiCon shortcut everything to the elevator test.
  2. Bring printed cards. Yes, in 2024. The booth crowd is still old-school.
  3. Pre-book mentor slots on the ChaiCon app the moment registration opens — they vanish within minutes.

"You don't need a perfect product to be at ChaiCon — you need the courage to talk to 200 strangers in three days." — Hira A., ChaiCon 2023 alumna

The bottom line

Pakistan's economy is rewriting itself in real time, and ChaiCon is the closest thing we have to a national town hall for builders. Block your calendar, charge your power bank, and we'll see you over a paper cup of chai at the Expo Centre.
